en: When Jesus had finished instructing his twelve disciples, he went on from there to teach and preach in their cities.
zh: 耶穌吩咐完了十二門徒，就離開那裡，在各城裡教導傳道。

en: Now when John heard in prison about the deeds of the Christ, he sent word by his disciples
zh: 約翰在監獄裡聽見基督所作的，就派門徒去問他：

en: and said to him, "Are you the one who is to come, or shall we look for another?"
zh: “你就是那位要來的，還是我們要等別人呢？”

en: And Jesus answered them, "Go and tell John what you hear and see:
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“你們回去，把聽見和看見的都告訴約翰，

en: the blind receive their sight and the lame walk, lepers are cleansed and the deaf hear, and the dead are raised up, and the poor have good news preached to them.
zh: 就是瞎的可以看見，瘸的可以走路，患痲風的得到潔淨，聾的可以聽見，死人復活，窮人有福音聽。

en: And blessed is the one who is not offended by me."
zh: 那不被我絆倒的，就有福了。”

en: As they went away, Jesus began to speak to the crowds concerning John: "What did you go out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken by the wind?
zh: 他們走了之後，耶穌對群眾講起約翰來，說：“你們到曠野去，是要看甚麼？被風吹動的蘆葦嗎？

en: What then did you go out to see? A man dressed in soft clothing? Behold, those who wear soft clothing are in kings' houses.
zh: 你們出去到底要看甚麼？身穿華麗衣裳的人嗎？那些穿著華麗衣裳的人，是在王宮裡的。

en: What then did you go out to see? A prophet? Yes, I tell you, and more than a prophet.
zh: 那麼，你們出去要看甚麼？先知嗎？我告訴你們，是的。他比先知重要得多了。

en: This is he of whom it is written, "' Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way before you.'
zh: 經上所記： ‘看哪，我差遣我的使者在你面前， 他必在你前頭預備你的道路。’ 這句話是指著他說的。

en: Truly, I say to you, among those born of women there has arisen no one greater than John the Baptist. Yet the one who is least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than he.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，婦人所生的，沒有一個比施洗的約翰更大；然而天國裡最小的比他還大。

en: From the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven has suffered violence, and the violent take it by force.
zh: 從施洗的約翰的時候直到現在，天國不斷遭受猛烈的攻擊，強暴的人企圖把它奪去。

en: For all the Prophets and the Law prophesied until John,
zh: 所有的先知和律法，直到約翰為止，都說了預言。

en: and if you are willing to accept it, he is Elijah who is to come.
zh: 如果你們肯接受，約翰就是那要來的以利亞。

en: He who has ears to hear, let him hear.
zh: 有耳的，就應當聽。

en: "But to what shall I compare this generation? It is like children sitting in the marketplaces and calling to their playmates,
zh: “我要把這世代比作甚麼呢？它好像一些小孩子坐在市中心，呼叫別的小孩子，

en: "'We played the flute for you, and you did not dance; we sang a dirge, and you did not mourn.'
zh: 說： ‘我們給你們吹笛子，你們卻不跳舞； 我們唱哀歌，你們也不捶胸。’

en: For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, 'He has a demon.'
zh: 約翰來了，不吃也不喝，人說他是鬼附的；

en: The Son of Man came eating and drinking, and they say, 'Look at him! A glutton and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' Yet wisdom is justified by her deeds."
zh: 人子來了，又吃又喝，人卻說：‘你看，這人貪食好酒，與稅吏和罪人為友。’但智慧藉著它所作的，就證實是公義的了。”

en: Then he began to denounce the cities where most of his mighty works had been done, because they did not repent.
zh: 那時，耶穌開始責備那些他曾在那裡行過許多神蹟的城，因為它們不肯悔改：

en: "Woe to you, Chorazin! Woe to you, Bethsaida! For if the mighty works done in you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.
zh: “哥拉遜啊，你有禍了！伯賽大啊，你有禍了！在你們那裡行過的神蹟，如果行在推羅和西頓，它們早已披麻蒙灰悔改了。

en: But I tell you, it will be more bearable on the day of judgment for Tyre and Sidon than for you.
zh: 但我告訴你們，在審判的日子，推羅和西頓所受的，比你們還輕呢。

en: And you, Capernaum, will you be exalted to heaven? You will be brought down to Hades. For if the mighty works done in you had been done in Sodom, it would have remained until this day.
zh: 迦百農啊！ 你會被高舉到天上嗎？ 你必降到陰間。 在你那裡行過的神蹟，如果行在所多瑪，那城還會存留到今天。

en: But I tell you that it will be more tolerable on the day of judgment for the land of Sodom than for you."
zh: 但我告訴你們，在審判的日子，所多瑪那地方所受的，比你還輕呢。”

en: At that time Jesus declared, "I thank you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, that you have hidden these things from the wise and understanding and revealed them to little children;
zh: 就在那時候，耶穌說：“父啊，天地的主，我讚美你，因為你把這些事向智慧和聰明的人隱藏起來，卻向嬰孩顯明。

en: yes, Father, for such was your gracious will.
zh: 父啊，是的，這就是你的美意。

en: All things have been handed over to me by my Father, and no one knows the Son except the Father, and no one knows the Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son chooses to reveal him.
zh: 我父已經把一切交給我；除了父沒有人認識子，除了子和子所願意啟示的人，沒有人認識父。

en: Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
zh: 你們所有勞苦擔重擔的人哪，到我這裡來吧！我必使你們得安息。

en: Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me, for I am gentle and lowly in heart, and you will find rest for your souls.
zh: 我心裡柔和謙卑，你們應當負我的軛，向我學習，你們就必得著心靈的安息；

en: For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light."
zh: 我的軛是容易負的，我的擔子是輕省的。”
